metadata.description: Design ops workflow plugins for Claude Code and Codex

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Design workflow plugin for workflow routing, idea capture, scoping, prototyping, engineering, review, tickets, MR packages, async demos, design story presos, updates, and artifact-loop reporting

plugins.name: live-canvas
plugins.description: Infinite canvas with live iframe artboards for multi-viewport design review, branch comparison, and design token tuning

plugins.name: work-os
plugins.description: Initialize and upgrade a local Work OS with branch-safe setup, version manifests, and local prime/report/feedback/reflect/audit skills

plugins.name: output-styles
plugins.description: Output styles for Claude Code that reshape how the agent responds, starting with be-brief for terse fragment-pattern replies
